ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather report */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather report */,
  "outside_temperature" TEXT /* Temperature range recorded outside */,
  "max_wind_speed" TEXT /* Maximum wind speed recorded */,
  "humidity" TEXT /* Humidity level recorded */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" TEXT /* Atmospheric pressure recorded */,
  "wave_height" TEXT /* Height of waves */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility conditions */,
  "cloud_cover" TEXT /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  "precipitation" TEXT /* Precipitation amount */,
  "sunrise" TEXT /* Time of sunrise */,
  "sunset" TEXT /* Time of sunset */,
  "opinion" TEXT /* Expert opinion on suitability of weather for sea activities */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the weather conditions */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station that recorded the report */,
  "expert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expert who provided the opinion */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_reports_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_reports_expert_id FOREIGN KEY ("expert_id") REFERENCES experts ("expert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" TEXT /* Elevation of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station (e.g., operational, maintenance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the station was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the station was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, operational manager, field staff) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES weather_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experts" (
  "expert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expert */,
  "expert_name" TEXT /* Full name of the expert */,
  "expert_email" TEXT /* Email address of the expert */,
  "expert_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the expert */,
  "expert_specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the expert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expert record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expert record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expert_id")
)
